title: Anthropic will require identity verification for advanced features starting July 2026
summary: The artificial intelligence company will implement identity controls to prevent misuse of its most powerful capabilities.

title: Apple launches iOS 27 beta with new AI tools for Siri and multiple features
summary: The operating system update incorporates AI-driven improvements and expands the capabilities of the virtual assistant.

title: AI use in education causes grade inflation and despair among students
summary: Studies indicate that artificial intelligence is being used for external assignments and generating psychological pressure on university students.

title: SpaceX shares plunge for two consecutive days and fall below Amazon in market capitalization
summary: The stock market drop has left post-IPO investors in the red after the space company's collapse.

title: Meta asks to modify child safety law to avoid lawsuits for harm to minors
summary: Mark Zuckerberg's company seeks legal protection while pressure continues for child protection on its platforms.

title: Meta suffers the worst morale in its history, according to its own CTO
summary: The company's CTO admits to a critical work environment after multiple controversies and restructurings.

title: Amazon investigates engineers who criticized the expansion of its artificial intelligence data centers
summary: The technology company examines internal criticisms about the growth of its AI infrastructure.

title: AWS launches two services to address context and security gaps in artificial intelligence agents
summary: The cloud platform offers new tools for AI agents to operate with greater precision and protection.

title: France allocates 13 billion euros to boost its technological sovereignty
summary: The French government mobilizes a massive investment to reduce foreign technological dependence.

title: White House delays publication of study on voting machine security
summary: The report, which could reveal critical vulnerabilities, remains unpublished despite demands for transparency.

title: NASA plans risky mission to save falling space telescope
summary: The orbital observatory, which threatens to disintegrate, could be rescued through an unprecedented maneuver.

title: Graham Norton gets court order against deepfakes created with his image on Facebook
summary: The British presenter secures a ruling in the US that forces the removal of fake videos using his face without consent.

title: Polymarket accused of using fake bets to simulate viral growth
summary: The prediction platform allegedly manipulated the market with fictitious transactions to attract users.

title: Ukraine launches platform to share captured Russian weapons technology with allies
summary: TrophyLab will allow allied countries to analyze and replicate missile systems, drones, and vehicles seized on the battlefield.

title: Half a million hours of drone recordings from the Ukraine war used to train artificial intelligence
summary: The dataset, the largest of its kind, is available to improve computer vision systems and combat analysis.

title: US Army develops systems to counter laser attacks against drones
summary: New tactics include armor and electronic countermeasures to protect unmanned aircraft from directed energy weapons.

title: Apple announces price increases due to rising memory costs
summary: The company attributes the decision to the global rise in storage chip prices, affecting several products.

title: Apple closes three physical stores in the United States due to decline of shopping malls
summary: The company continues its store network readjustment amid declining traffic in traditional malls.

title: Nothing cancels its 2026 CMF phone due to rising memory costs
summary: The British company suspends the launch of its mid-range model due to high component costs.

title: Microsoft ends support for Office 2021 on October 13
summary: The company urges users to migrate to newer versions to continue receiving security updates.
